abstract: The original version of this article, published on 18 august 2020 contained a mistake. An author's name was misspelled.
journal: Osteoporosis international : a journal established as result of cooperation between the European Foundation for Osteoporosis and the National Osteoporosis Foundation of the USA
title: Correction to: Characteristics of incidence hip fracture cases in older adults participating in the longitudinal AGES-Reykjavik study.
